AISSAOUA Habib

Associate Professor, Department of Computer Science, University of Setif
An associate professor in the department of computer Science at university of Setif since January 2010. He obtained his doctorate in networks and distributed systems on October 24, 2018, from university of Bejaia . His research interests span distributed systems, wireless sensor networks, mobile ad hoc networks, cybersecurity, and quantum computing. He is passionate about advancing knowledge at the intersection of secure network architectures and emerging quantum technologies.
Recommendation policy
Due to the high number of recommendation letter requests I receive, I have implemented a policy to ensure that I can write truly meaningful and personalized recommendation letters. I provide recommendation letters only to requests from::
- students whose final year project (PFE) or thesis I
have directly supervised,
- Top of the year(
majors de promotion
).
